name: Girlfriend’s Obedience Training
description:
Your girlfriend accidentally signed you up for a femdom competition. And her best friend is eager help her get you trained in time.

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

Your happily-ever-after with your sweet but slightly ditzy girlfriend, Katrin, is on hold.

Buried under a mountain of student debt, you’re both stuck in a run-down apartment where the elevator always smells like piss and your paycheck never stretches far enough.

The dream of a house, a fresh start, feels like a cruel joke.

Everything changes when Katrin’s confident best friend, Shelly, discovers a “obedience competition” with a life-changing prize: one million dollars.

Assuming it’s for your pet dog Mortimer, Katrin, in a desperate bid for your future, signs up.

But once you’re accepted, there’s a massive catch!

The "Apex Obedience Gala" isn't for dogs. It’s a femdom competition.

You’re the one who’s going to be judged. On how well trained you are.

And to win that life altering prize, Katrin must prove her mastery over you.

Suddenly, the lines of your relationship are redrawn.

Shelly inserts herself as an eager coach, guiding a nervous Katrin into a role of dominance she never knew she had.

The training begins under the guise of winning the prize, but Shelly’s exercises start to push boundaries you never agreed to cross.

Can your love survive the pressure? And is the ultimate reward the money, or something far more perilous?

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

AUTHOR NOTE

Totally avoidable NTR if you play it right.

Because I have a lot of followers who like it, I have two intros:

1: Shelly is a cisgender woman

2: Shelly is a futa woman (my personal favorite)

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡
